message:
refactor: Add h.wrap2() helper; convert 23 more modules to shared helpers

- Add wrap2(pre, mid, suf, default) for 2-arg wrap patterns
- Convert: _frozen_importlib_external, getopt, mailbox, netrc,
  modulefinder, nntplib, pipes, pkgutil, plistlib, pyclbr,
  reprlib, shlex, sre_compile, sre_parse, sunau, tokenize,
  tty, urllib_robotparser, wave, webbrowser, wsgiref, xdrlib,
  xml_sax modules to use h.wrap/h.pass helpers

Line count: 7085 → 6923 (-162 lines)
Total reduction from start: 7393 → 6923 (-470 lines, 6.4%)
